reviews.review_description:
As the base-package came for free, nothing to complain.
The puzzles start at 9 pieces and are limited to 64 pieces max, which is pretty easy… Also, the puzzle-pieces are already oriented correctly, which could add a lot to the difficulty. One feature I miss in this game: achievements – there is no display, which puzzles were solved in what difficulty (number of pieces). All in all: casual fun, but nothing deep.

This VR game delivers a fantastic mix of missions, from static shooting with fun enemies to on-rails action, puzzles, and epic boss fights that feel impossible at first—until you master their weaknesses. The gameplay variety keeps things fresh and exciting.

Visually, the game is stunning, with vivid colors that enhance immersion without being overwhelming. The graphics are well-executed, and the fluid, responsive gameplay makes every moment enjoyable.

On top of that, a new DLC has just dropped, proving that the developers are committed to expanding and improving the experience. If you're looking for a dynamic and polished VR game, this one is highly recommended!

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)

This is a free app with some fairly prized lovely Jigsaw puzzles from the Mess Universe. The first of its kind. If you will love to solve fun Jigsaw Puzzles in mixed reality, this is the game for you. The music is also soothing and relaxing. Highly recommend.
